text_block_list.text:
The day of the Fan Fest has arrived, and Hishi
Amazon is participating in the events.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Gather round for the spiciest fight ever! The
leaders of Miho and Ritto Dorm will be competing
in a high-stakes curry cook-off!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, please turn your attention to the
display monitor!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, are we on? All right then... Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The name's Hishi Amazon, and I'm the leader of
Miho Dormitory!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm stakin' the reputation of my dorm on this
battle, and I won't be beaten!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well that makes two of us. I have no
intention of losing either.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whoever wins will receive free carrot ice cream
for their entire dorm, and my dear ponies are all
looking forward to enjoying a cool treat.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text: Squee! You look so good on the big screen, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah! Show 'em what you're made of, Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our judge for today is none other than Oguri
Cap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm happy to be here!

With the crowd hungry for action, the cook-off
begins!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Grrraaah! I'm gonna dice ya to smithereens!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama is chopping through carrots left and
right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Need to make sure there's plenty of 'em for
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm always cooking up a storm for my residents, so
this should be a piece of cake!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: I'm sure our judge will appreciate the effort!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
As for what Fuji is up to... Oh! She's blended
together a symphony of spices!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're rather graceful with the kitchen
knife, Hishiama. I'm positive your curry will turn
out great.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I won't stand a chance against you with just any
old strategy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So this time around... I'm going to spice things
up—literally.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
On one side, we have a homely Japanese-style
curry and on the other, we have a spicy Indian
curry! This is turning out to be quite the cook-off!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Both dishes are finished and ready to be
presented onstage! They smell absolutely
delightful!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My curry is sure to satisfy even the hungriest
growing gal. It's chock-full of healthy veggies and
meaty chunks of fried chicken!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here I have an Indian curry, made with a blend of
spices. I've also prepared a lassi, salad, and
cheese naan to accompany it.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Wow! These are two drastically different dishes,
but they're both equally stunning!

text_block_list.name: Hishiama and Fuji
text_block_list.text: Please enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I sure will!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is savoring the curries, bite by bite!
Which one will please her palate the most?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's... a tie!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! What an unexpected answer! What
do you mean by this, Oguri Cap?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Both curries are warm, nourishing, and delicious.
Therefore, neither is better than the other!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Who could have seen this coming?! Even the
audience is astir with confusion!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What the judge says goes! If she says it's a draw,
then it's a draw!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy enough that I got to partake in such a
fiery competition, so no complaints here!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have to agree with Hishiama. We shouldn't force
a decision.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How about we split the carrot ice cream between
our dorms?

With both of the dorm leaders happy to move on,
the audience follows suit.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the wonderful meal.

And so, the curry competition concludes
smoothly with smiles all around.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's happened to Oguri Cap?! She hasn't
moved an inch since tasting Hishiama's curry!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This flavor... it's just like the stuff they serve at
Masae, a mom-and-pop restaurant back in my
hometown!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
These big chunks of carrots, hunks of extra crispy
meat, and soy sauce-flavored fried chicken...
Everything is identical!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Masae! I hope you're doing well!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: My goodness, Oguri Cap is in tears!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what's happenin'... but if she's happy,
that goes for me too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, have some more! There's plenty for
seconds and thirds!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Masaeee!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, haha! Goodness, this is clearly my loss. You
are a force to be reckoned with, Hishiama.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your gentle, tender heart was what brought back
such precious memories to Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: This wasn't how I imagined myself winning.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But, well, I guess it doesn't feel too bad!

And with that, the Fan Fest wraps up as a huge
success!

The Masae-style curry goes on to become a
limited-time cafeteria dish, but that's another
story.
